name: core.openwop.workflows.people-hr
description: Real-work workflow pack (RFC 0013, ADR 0149) — the People / HR cluster: Employee Onboarding Orchestrator, Offboarding & Access Revocation, and Leave/PTO Request Routing. Reasons with core.ai.chatCompletion; binds Workday (HRIS), Microsoft 365, and Jira via core.openwop.http.openapi-call connectionRef; every account/HRIS mutation and every team-facing send is gated by core.chat.approvalGate. All tenant-specific values are run parameters (replay-deterministic). Resolves on hosts shipping the http + ai + chat + integration packs; connections are configured under Access & data → Connections. Published under core.openwop.workflows.* (openwop-team key).
author: openwop
